Description: Identifies agent blueprint principals where appOwnerOrganizationId does not match the current tenant, indicating a third-party agent operating in your directory.
Risk: External agent blueprints are published by other organizations. The tenant admin has limited visibility into their code, data handling, and update lifecycle. Broad permissions on external agents multiply this risk.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review the external agent's publisher, permissions, and data access. Validate the agent's verified publisher status. Remove or restrict agents from untrusted publishers.

SourceNotes: External agents identified by comparing appOwnerOrganizationId to the tenant ID.
